http.comment: Check ability to send news via API

condition.comment: Create fist condition that is true
condition.name: firstCondition

condition.comment: Create second condition that is false
condition.name: secondCondition

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct SELECT query with TRUE condition
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE newsName LIKE "%slights%"

mysql.comment: Check impossibility to conduct SELECT query with FALSE condition
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE newsName LIKE "%slights%"

condition.comment: Check ability to create condition with TRUE condition 'firstCondition'
condition.name: thirdCondition

condition.comment: Check impossibility to create condition with FALSE condition 'secondCondition'
condition.name: fourthCondition

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct SELECT query with TRUE condition
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE newsName LIKE "%slights%"

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct INSERT query using two TRUE conditions and 'AND' operator
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (2, 'News2', 2, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Make sure that new with id 2 was successfully added
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE id = 2

mysql.comment: Check impossibility to conduct SELECT query using two TRUE conditions, one FALSE condition and 'AND' operator ('Command was skipped because of the condition' must be displayed in logs)
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE newsName LIKE "%slights%"

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct INSERT query using two TRUE conditions and 'AND' operator
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (3, 'News3', 3, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Make sure that new with id 3 was successfully added
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE id = 3

mysql.comment: Check impossibility to conduct SELECT query using one TRUE condition, one FALSE condition and 'AND' operator ('Command was skipped because of the condition' must be displayed in logs)
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE newsName LIKE "%slights%"

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct INSERT query using one TRUE, one FALSE conditions and 'OR' operator
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (4, 'News4', 4, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Make sure that new with id 4 was successfully added
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE id = 4

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct INSERT query using TRUE, FALSE, TRUE conditions and 'OR', 'AND' operators
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (5, 'News5', 5, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Make sure that new with id 5 was successfully added
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE id = 5

mysql.comment: Check impossibility to conduct SELECT query using FALSE, TRUE, FALSE conditions and 'AND', 'OR' operators ('Command was skipped because of the condition' must be displayed in logs)
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE newsName LIKE "%slights%"

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct INSERT query using FALSE, FALSE, TRUE conditions and 'OR' operator
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (6, 'News6', 6, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Make sure that new with id 6 was successfully added
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE id = 6

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct INSERT query using two TRUE conditions and 'AND' operator
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (7, 'News7', 7, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Make sure that new with id 7 was successfully added
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE id = 7

mysql.comment: Check impossibility to conduct INSERT query using TRUE condition and '!' operator ('Command was skipped because of the condition' must be displayed in logs)
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (8, 'News8', 8, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct INSERT query using 'true' statement as condition
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (9, 'News9', 9, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Make sure that new with id 9 was successfully added
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE id = 9

mysql.comment: Check impossibility to conduct INSERT query using 'false' statement as condition
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (10, 'News10', 10, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Check ability to conduct INSERT query using complicated condition
mysql.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (11, 'News11', 11, true, '2023-04-21 10:48:26.096000')

mysql.comment: Make sure that new with id 11 was successfully added
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE id = 11
